'''basoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rnwy|rnwy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-s-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rnwy|rnwy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| basoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæseyeth|bæseyeth]] || [[word:bæseyej|bæseyej]] || [[word:bæseyesh|bæseyesh]] || [[word:bæseye|bæseye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:basosoyoth|basosoyoth]] || [[word:basosoyoj|basosoyoj]] || [[word:basosoyosh|basosoyosh]] || [[word:basosoyo|basosoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:basoyoth|basoyoth]] || [[word:basoyoj|basoyoj]] || [[word:basoyosh|basoyosh]] || [[word:basoyo|basoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:basofyoth|basofyoth]] || [[word:basofyoj|basofyoj]] || [[word:basofyosh|basofyosh]] || [[word:basofyof|basofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:basoyotho|basoyotho]] || [[word:basoyojo|basoyojo]] || [[word:basoyosho|basoyosho]] || [[word:basoyoko|basoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:basoyoth|basoyoth]] || [[word:basoyoj|basoyoj]] || [[word:basoyosh|basoyosh]] || [[word:basoyo|basoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:basoyothol|basoyothol]] || [[word:basoyojol|basoyojol]] || [[word:basoyoshol|basoyoshol]] || [[word:basoyokol|basoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:basoyothotho|basoyothotho]] || [[word:basoyojojo|basoyojojo]] || [[word:basoyoshosho|basoyoshosho]] || [[word:basoyoko|basoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:basoyothon|basoyothon]] || [[word:basoyojon|basoyojon]] || [[word:basoyoshon|basoyoshon]] || [[word:basoyokon|basoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:basoyothoro|basoyothoro]] || [[word:basoyojoro|basoyojoro]] || [[word:basoyoshoro|basoyoshoro]] || [[word:basoyokoro|basoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
